Rung.Comment: Get parameters on first scan Set brake automatic on first scan
Rung.Text: XIC(bitFirstScan)[GSV(Axis,Servo_Drive,HomeMode,intHomeMode) ,NEQ(intHomeMode,1) OTL(bitAbsoluteHome) ,EQU(intHomeMode,1) OTU(bitAbsoluteHome) ,GSV(Axis,Servo_Drive,MaximumSpeed,dblSpeedMax) ,GSV(Axis,Servo_Drive,MaximumAcceleration,dblAccelMax) ,GSV(Axis,Servo_Drive,MaximumDeceleration,dblDecelMax) ,LEQ(Command.Speed,0) MOV(0.001,Command.Speed) ,LEQ(Command.Accel,0) MOV(0.001,Command.Accel) ,LEQ(Command.Decel,0) MOV(0.001,Command.Decel) ,LEQ(Command.AccelJerk,0) MOV(10,Command.AccelJerk) ,LEQ(Command.DecelJerk,0) MOV(10,Command.DecelJerk) ,SSV(Axis,Servo_Drive,MechanicalBrakeControl,K_int0) ,OTU(statManBrakeReleased) ];

Rung.Comment: Apply multiplier on change to manual mode
Default move absolute settling timer timeout value
Default move relative settling timer timeout value
Default absolute home enable delay timer value
On permissives lost issue stop command
Check if motion in progess when permissive lost
Turn off manual disable when not in manual mode

Rung.Text: [XIO(Command.Jog_Pos_Req) XIC(cmdMAJpos.IP) ,XIO(Command.Jog_Neg_Req) XIC(cmdMAJneg.IP) ]MAS(Servo_Drive,cmdMASjog,All,No,Command.Decel,Units per sec2,No,Command.DecelJerk,% of Time);

XIC(Command.Jog_Pos_Req)[EQU(intEOTRecoverStep,0) XIC(Motion_Permissive) XIC(permInhibitMotion) MAJ(Servo_Drive,cmdMAJpos,0,Command.Speed,Units per sec,Command.Accel,Units per sec2,Command.Decel,Units per sec2,S-Curve,Command.AccelJerk,Command.DecelJerk,% of Time,0,0,0,None) ,[XIO(Motion_Permissive) MOV(401,statFaultCode) ,XIO(permInhibitMotion) MOV(402,statFaultCode) ,NEQ(intEOTRecoverStep,0) MOV(403,statFaultCode) ] OTU(Command.Jog_Pos_Req) ];

XIC(Command.Jog_Neg_Req)[EQU(intEOTRecoverStep,0) XIC(Motion_Permissive) XIC(permInhibitMotion) MAJ(Servo_Drive,cmdMAJneg,1,Command.Speed,Units per sec,Command.Accel,Units per sec2,Command.Decel,Units per sec2,S-Curve,Command.AccelJerk,Command.DecelJerk,% of Time,0,0,0,None) ,[XIO(Motion_Permissive) MOV(501,statFaultCode) ,XIO(permInhibitMotion) MOV(502,statFaultCode) ,NEQ(intEOTRecoverStep,0) MOV(503,statFaultCode) ] OTU(Command.Jog_Neg_Req) ];

[XIC(Command.Clear_Fault_Req) [XIC(Servo_Drive.ShutdownStatus) OTL(bFaultMASR) ,XIC(statFaulted) XIO(statEOTpos) XIO(statEOTneg) OTL(bFaultMAFR) ] ,XIC(bFaultMASR) MASR(Servo_Drive,cmdMASR) ,XIC(bFaultMAFR) MAFR(Servo_Drive,cmdMAFR[0]) ,[XIC(cmdMASR.DN) ,XIC(tmrFaultResetTO.DN) ] OTU(bFaultMASR) ,[XIC(cmdMAFR[0].DN) ,XIC(tmrFaultResetTO.DN) ] OTU(bFaultMAFR) ,[XIC(bFaultMASR) ,XIC(bFaultMAFR) ] TON(tmrFaultResetTO,?,?) ];

Rung.Comment: Clear Faults Start EOT recover if needed
Set TON to 2s to allow time for servo to disable limits.
Wait for overtravels to be disabled so move off sensor is ok

Rung.Text: EQU(intEOTRecoverStep,20)XIC(permInhibitMotion)XIC(Servo_Drive.ServoActionStatus)[MAM(Servo_Drive,cmdMAMrelEOT[0],1,Temp_Move_Dist,1,% of Maximum,10,% of Maximum,10,% of Maximum,Trapezoidal,10,10,% of Maximum,Disabled,Programmed,0,None,0,0) ,XIC(cmdMAMrelEOT[0].DN) MOV(30,intEOTRecoverStep) ];

Rung.Comment: Wait for EOT Off, Stop Motion and Enable OT if a permissive drops out or motor power is lost, return to previous step to retry move so the EOT recovery does not hang

Rung.Text: EQU(intEOTRecoverStep,50)XIC(permInhibitMotion)XIC(Servo_Drive.ServoActionStatus)[MAM(Servo_Drive,cmdMAMrelEOT[1],1,Temp_Move_Dist2,BackoffSpeed,Units per sec,10,% of Maximum,10,% of Maximum,Trapezoidal,10,10,% of Maximum,Disabled,Programmed,0,None,0,0) ,XIC(cmdMAMrelEOT[1].DN) MOV(0,intEOTRecoverStep) ];

Rung.Comment: If hard OT recovery disabled when limits are ok reset
Enable OT After Leaving Manual Mode

Rung.Text: XIC(Command.Move_Abs_Req)[XIC(Servo_Drive.AxisHomedStatus) LIM(dblPositionLL,Command.Move_Abs_Position,dblPositionUL) EQU(intEOTRecoverStep,0) XIC(permInhibitMotion) XIC(Motion_Permissive) [MAM(Servo_Drive,cmdMAMabs,intAbsMoveType,Command.Move_Abs_Position,Command.Speed,Units per sec,Command.Accel,Units per sec2,Command.Decel,Units per sec2,Trapezoidal,Command.AccelJerk,Command.DecelJerk,% of Maximum,Disabled,Programmed,0,None,0,0) ,OTU(statMoveAbsComplete) ,XIC(cmdMAMabs.DN) OTU(Command.Move_Abs_Req) ] ,[XIO(Motion_Permissive) MOV(101,statFaultCode) ,XIO(permInhibitMotion) MOV(102,statFaultCode) ,NEQ(intEOTRecoverStep,0) MOV(103,statFaultCode) ,XIO(Servo_Drive.AxisHomedStatus) MOV(104,statFaultCode) ,[GRT(Command.Move_Abs_Position,dblPositionUL) ,LES(Command.Move_Abs_Position,dblPositionLL) ] MOV(105,statFaultCode) ] [OTU(Command.Move_Abs_Req) ,OTU(cmdMAMabs.PC) ,OTU(statMoveAbsComplete) ] ];

Rung.Comment: Move complete Timer for settling timeout

Rung.Text: XIC(Command.Move_Rel_Req)[EQU(intEOTRecoverStep,0) XIC(permInhibitMotion) XIC(Motion_Permissive) [MAM(Servo_Drive,cmdMAMrel,1,Command.Move_Rel_Position,Command.Speed,Units per sec,Command.Accel,Units per sec2,Command.Decel,Units per sec2,Trapezoidal,Command.AccelJerk,Command.DecelJerk,% of Maximum,Disabled,Programmed,0,None,0,0) ,OTU(statMoveRelComplete) ,XIC(cmdMAMrel.DN) OTU(Command.Move_Rel_Req) ] ,[XIO(Motion_Permissive) MOV(201,statFaultCode) ,XIO(permInhibitMotion) MOV(202,statFaultCode) ,NEQ(intEOTRecoverStep,0) MOV(203,statFaultCode) ] [OTU(Command.Move_Rel_Req) ,OTU(cmdMAMrel.PC) ,OTU(statMoveRelComplete) ] ];

Rung.Comment: Move complete Timer for settling timeout
Disable home when drive is enabled

Rung.Text: XIC(Command.Home_Req)[EQU(intEOTRecoverStep,0) [XIO(bitAbsoluteHome) XIC(Motion_Permissive) XIC(permInhibitMotion) ,XIC(bitAbsoluteHome) XIO(Servo_Drive.DriveEnableStatus) ] [MAH(Servo_Drive,cmdMAH) ,[XIC(statHoming) ,XIC(cmdMAH.PC) ] OTU(Command.Home_Req) ] ,[XIO(bitAbsoluteHome) XIO(Motion_Permissive) MOV(301,statFaultCode) ,XIO(bitAbsoluteHome) XIO(permInhibitMotion) MOV(302,statFaultCode) ,NEQ(intEOTRecoverStep,0) MOV(303,statFaultCode) ,XIC(bitAbsoluteHome) XIC(Servo_Drive.DriveEnableStatus) MOV(308,statFaultCode) ] OTU(Command.Home_Req) ];

Rung.Comment: Absolute home enable drive delay timer

Rung.Text: [XIC(tmrHomeTO.DN) MOV(306,statFaultCode) ,XIC(tmrMoveAbsSettleTO.DN) MOV(106,statFaultCode) ,XIC(tmrMoveRelSettleTO.DN) MOV(206,statFaultCode) ,XIC(cmdMASjog.ER) MOV(9,statFaultCode) ,XIC(cmdMAJpos.ER) MOV(407,statFaultCode) ,XIC(cmdMAJneg.ER) MOV(507,statFaultCode) ,XIC(cmdMASmove.ER) MOV(9,statFaultCode) ,XIC(cmdMSO.ER) MOV(10,statFaultCode) ,XIC(cmdMSF.ER) MOV(11,statFaultCode) ,XIC(cmdMAFR[0].ER) MOV(12,statFaultCode) ,XIC(cmdMAFR[1].ER) MOV(13,statFaultCode) ,XIC(cmdMAFR[2].ER) MOV(14,statFaultCode) ,XIC(cmdMASR.ER) MOV(15,statFaultCode) ,XIC(cmdMAMabs.ER) MOV(107,statFaultCode) ,XIC(cmdMAMrel.ER) MOV(207,statFaultCode) ,XIC(cmdMAH.ER) MOV(307,statFaultCode) ,XIC(cmdMAMrelEOT[0].ER) MOV(18,statFaultCode) ,XIC(cmdMAMrelEOT[1].ER) MOV(19,statFaultCode) ];

[XIC(Servo_Drive.PhysicalAxisFault) MOV(601,statFaultCode) ,XIC(Servo_Drive.ModuleFault) MOV(602,statFaultCode) ,XIC(Servo_Drive.ConfigFault) MOV(603,statFaultCode) ,XIC(Servo_Drive.GroupFault) MOV(604,statFaultCode) ,XIC(Servo_Drive.MotionFault) MOV(605,statFaultCode) ,XIC(Servo_Drive.GuardFault) MOV(606,statFaultCode) ,XIC(Servo_Drive.InitializationFault) MOV(607,statFaultCode) ,XIC(Servo_Drive.APRFault) MOV(608,statFaultCode) ,XIC(Servo_Drive.ShutdownStatus) MOV(609,statFaultCode) ];

Rung.Comment: CIP Drive State : 2= Axis Stopped, 3=Axis Starting, 4=Axis Running, 6= Axis Stopping
Shows the value of the current location index on the HMI indicator
Shows the value of the current location index on the HMI indicator
Teach PB moves the current position into the axis locations index
Turn off brake release if not manual or drive is enabled
Disable brake if manual release is pressed
Enable brake if enabled, not in manual mode or manual relase is not pressed
Load currently selected position into the move abs target
Enables soft end of travel limits ^^^^
Disables hard and soft travel limits ^^^^
